name: Meigen AI Design MCP
what_it_does: Meigen AI Design MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Meigen's AI-powered design platform — generating and editing visual designs, UI mockups, graphics, and design assets through natural language prompts, integrating AI-driven design capabilities into agent workflows for content creation and visual asset production.
use_cases: Generating UI mockups and wireframes from design descriptions from product agents
Creating branded graphic assets from content creation agents
Producing visual design iterations from design review agents
Automating design asset generation for marketing from campaign agents
Creating social media graphics from content marketing agents
Generating icon sets and visual elements from UI development agents
not_for: Complex 3D modeling (use Blender or dedicated 3D tools)
Print-ready professional design (use Adobe tools for precision print work)
best_when: An agent needs to generate visual design assets programmatically — Meigen provides AI-driven design generation from text prompts for UI, graphics, and marketing assets.
avoid_when: You need professional-grade print design, complex 3D assets, or video content.

auth.notes: Meigen AI API key required. Store as environment variable. Check Meigen AI platform for key generation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Limited design generations per month on free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Subscription tiers for higher generation limits
pricing.notes: Freemium model typical for AI design platforms. Check Meigen AI website for current pricing.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply; check Meigen AI documentation for current quotas

known_agent_gotchas: AI design generation can be slow (seconds to minutes) — build timeout handling in agent workflows
Generated designs may require iterative refinement — text prompts for design are approximate
API rate limits can block rapid design iteration — implement backoff strategy
Design output format (PNG, SVG, etc.) depends on platform capabilities — verify before use
Community/smaller platform — check for active maintenance and API stability
Design consistency across multiple calls may vary — AI generation is non-deterministic
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS API calls. API key auth. Design assets stored on Meigen platform — check data retention policies. Store API key as environment variable.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS API. API key auth. Uploaded design content sent to Meigen servers. Check privacy policy for data handling.
